sources.graph_use: Attachment route requires a court attachment order for execution against debtor claims toward third parties.
sources.route_use: Attachment-style route source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Collection order route must distinguish collection order from assignment order and finality requirements.
sources.route_use: Collection-order route source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Attachment target checks must inspect wage, severance, deposit, insurance, livelihood account, and one-month living cost exemptions.
sources.route_use: Attachment exemption and protected-target review source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Property disclosure requires money-payment enforcement title and executable copy/documents.
sources.route_use: Property-disclosure route source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Property inquiry route depends on prior property disclosure episode, statutory failure/insufficiency condition, institution scope, and prepaid costs.
sources.route_use: Property-inquiry route source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Default registry route needs final/written title plus six-month nonpayment or property disclosure failure proof.
sources.route_use: Debtor-default-registry route source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Payment order becomes title-equivalent only after no objection/withdrawal/dismissal finality.
sources.route_use: Payment-order title acquisition route source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Judgment-equivalent claim limitation clock is generally modeled as 10 years after finality, with maturity caveat.
sources.route_use: Limitation extension and stale-claim review source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Claims, attachment/provisional attachment/provisional disposition, and acknowledgment become limitation events in debtor timeline.
sources.route_use: Limitation interruption route source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Fraudulent transfer route needs suspicious transfer, harm/knowledge facts, and one-year/five-year deadlines.
sources.route_use: Fraudulent-transfer review route source reference; advisory only.

sources.rule_axis: 폭행 협박 반복 야간 연락 등 금지
sources.graph_use: Contact/action recommendation must block coercive, repeated, night, third-party exposure, and unlawful pressure patterns.
sources.route_use: Collection conduct compliance source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Agent must not imply nonexistent claim, state authority, false legal status, or untrue proceeding state.
sources.route_use: Route explanation truthfulness compliance source reference; advisory only.

sources.graph_use: Cease/review gates required for relationship contact, insolvency stay, discharge/rehabilitation, and exposed postcard-like communications.
sources.route_use: Unfair-action and cease/review compliance source reference; advisory only.

sources.law_name: 신용정보의 이용 및 보호에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: Debtor memory ingestion must track purpose, minimum-necessary scope, fair collection, consent/exception basis.
sources.route_use: Credit-information purpose and minimization source reference; advisory only.

sources.law_name: 신용정보의 이용 및 보호에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: External financial-credit data route requires consent/exception/proof-burden metadata before graph promotion.
sources.route_use: External credit-information source-gating reference; advisory only.

sources.law_name: 채무자 회생 및 파산에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: Insolvency signal can block execution, provisional attachment, auction, and repayment demands until review.
sources.route_use: Insolvency stay source reference for route blocking/review; advisory only.

sources.law_name: 채무자 회생 및 파산에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: Commencement order can stop/prohibit enforcement/repayment demand; limitation clock handling must record stopped period.
sources.route_use: Insolvency commencement source reference for route blocking/review; advisory only.

sources.law_name: 채무자 회생 및 파산에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: Discharge detection should block ordinary collection unless claim falls in statutory exception category.
sources.route_use: Discharge source reference for route blocking/review; advisory only.
